pr_summary: PR adds changes in typescript — Add order cancellation and status polling

findings.title: Missing Input Validation
findings.suggestion: Add input validation to ensure orderId is a valid and authorized order ID, e.g., `if (!isValidOrderId(orderId)) { throw new Error('Invalid order ID'); }`
findings.description: The orderId parameter is not validated, which could lead to potential IDOR (Insecure Direct Object Reference) vulnerabilities if an attacker can manipulate the orderId.

findings.title: Missing Authorization Check
findings.suggestion: Add an authorization check to ensure the user is the owner of the order or has the necessary permissions, e.g., `if (order.userId !== userId) { throw new Error('Unauthorized'); }`
findings.description: The code does not check if the user is authorized to cancel the order, which could lead to IDOR vulnerabilities.

findings.title: Potential Resource Leak
findings.suggestion: Add a timeout or a maximum number of retries to prevent the loop from running indefinitely, e.g., `const maxRetries = 10; let retries = 0; while (status === 'pending' && retries < maxRetries) { ... }`
findings.description: The pollOrderStatus function uses a while loop with a sleep function, which could potentially lead to a resource leak if the loop runs indefinitely.

findings.title: Hardcoded User ID
findings.suggestion: Use a secure and configurable way to specify the system user ID, e.g., `const systemUserId = process.env.SYSTEM_USER_ID;`
findings.description: The 'system' user ID is hardcoded, which could be a security risk if the system user ID is not properly secured.

findings.title: Missing Input Validation
findings.line_content: const discounts: any = { SAVE10: 0.1, SAVE20: 0.2, SAVE50: 0.5 };
findings.suggestion: Add input validation to ensure the discountCode is a valid and authorized discount code, e.g., `if (!isValidDiscountCode(discountCode)) { throw new Error('Invalid discount code'); }`
findings.description: The discountCode parameter is not validated, which could lead to potential issues if an invalid discount code is provided.

findings.recommendation: Use Promise.all and IN clause to fetch orders in bulk

findings.description: Infinite polling loop in pollOrderStatus function
findings.recommendation: Add a timeout or max-retry condition to prevent infinite loop
